characters.appearance: Male, 20s-30s, South Asian. Short dark hair, beard and mustache. Average build.
characters.wardrobe: Black denim jacket over a white t-shirt. Silver watch on left wrist.

characters.appearance: Male, 40s-50s, East Asian. Short dark hair, wearing glasses. Average build.
characters.wardrobe: White short-sleeve polo shirt, blue jeans.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: English बोलने में डर लगता है? [Scared to speak in English?]
Character A says: Supernova India का सबसे practical spoken-English app है। [Supernova is India's most practical spoken-English app.]
Character A says: Let me show you how it works. [Let me show you how it works.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Hooks the viewer by addressing the common fear of speaking English.
- Introduces Supernova as a practical, accessible solution.
- Sets up the demo format with a confident, encouraging tone.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text: Supernova is India's most practical spoken-English app. Speak with confidence. Let me show you how it works.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: बस app खोलो और हमारे AI tutor के साथ practice शुरू करो। [Just open the app and start practicing with our AI tutor.]
Character A says: Hello sir, I am here for the interview. [Hello sir, I am here for the interview.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Demonstrates the ease of starting a practice session.
- Shows a real-world scenario (job interview) that resonates with working professionals.
- Highlights the AI tutor feature visually.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text: Practice with AI Tutor. Hello sir, I am here for the interview. 1. Real-world practice 2. No judgment 3. Instant feedback

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: और अगर आप बोलते वक्त अटकते हैं, तो Supernova उसे तुरंत सही करता है। [And if you get stuck while speaking, Supernova corrects it instantly.]
Character A says: I gives... actually, um, I give the presentation. [I gives... actually, um, I give the presentation.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Addresses the fear of making mistakes by showing the app's gentle correction feature.
- Uses a relatable grammatical error to show how the AI provides instant feedback.
- Reinforces the safe, non-judgmental learning environment.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text: Supernova fixes your mistakes instantly. I gives... actually, um, I give the presentation. INSTANT CORRECTIONS

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: रोज़मर्रा की situations के लिए ये perfect है। [It's perfect for everyday situations.]
Character A says: Office meeting हो, customer से बात करनी हो, या दोस्तों के साथ, सब practice करो। [Whether it's an office meeting, talking to a customer, or with friends, practice everything.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Broadens the app's appeal by listing various practical modules.
- Connects the learning directly to the user's daily life and career needs.
- Maintains an encouraging, older-sibling tone.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text: Perfect for everyday situations. Office meetings, customers, friends. PRACTICAL LESSONS DAILY SCENARIOS

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: And the best part is, आप अकेले में practice कर सकते हैं। [And the best part is, you can practice in private.]
Character A says: बिना किसी झिझक के, अपने phone पर। [Without any hesitation, on your phone.]
Character A says: See? Confidence building is that easy. [See? Confidence building is that easy.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Solves the problem of embarrassment by highlighting private practice.
- Shows the physical action of speaking softly into the phone.
- Delivers a strong payoff about building confidence easily.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text: And the best part is you can practice in private. Build confidence without hesitation. Confidence building is that easy.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character B says: Supernova ने मेरे career को एक नई दिशा दी है। [Supernova has given my career a new direction.]
Character B says: अब मैं office में पूरे confidence के साथ English बोलता हूँ। [Now I speak English in the office with full confidence.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Provides social proof through a relatable, professional testimonial.
- Focuses on the ultimate emotional payoff: career growth and workplace confidence.
- Ends the ad on a strong, authoritative note.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text: SUPERNOVA GAVE MY CAREER A NEW DIRECTION. Now I speak English with full confidence.
